title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 12–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Chopper as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
